items.question: What is the fuel policy?
items.answer: Return the vehicle with the agreed fuel level. Keep fuel receipts when possible.

items.question: How do I extend my trip?
items.answer: Use the rental platform or contact the host before your current booking end time.

items.question: What should I do for a puncture?
items.answer: Park safely, switch on hazard lights, contact support, and use the spare wheel only if you are comfortable doing so.

items.question: What should I do after an accident?
items.answer: Move to safety, call emergency services if needed, document the scene, and inform the host immediately.

items.question: Where are the documents?
items.answer: Digital and physical copies are kept as per host instructions. Check the glove box and document section.
